seoTitle: Lonnavale vs Loorana — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lonnavale and Loorana. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lonnavale and Loorana.
heading: Lonnavale vs Loorana — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lonnavale, Tasmania and Loorana, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Loorana has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Lonnavale (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lonnavale or Loorana safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lonnavale has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Loorana scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lonnavale scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Loorana scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lonnavale or Loorana?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Loorana has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
